raw_excerpt:
"""Per-product sweep for the 3 STRONG-TICK-MR products on R5 d2/d3/d4.

Score := pnl − 0.1 × max_drawdown_abs (per day), averaged across the 3 days.
For each product we generate single-product test algos so the backtester's
total PnL and DD reflect that product alone. All other products' position
limits are 10 (R5 universal cap), enforced via --limit flags.
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import json
import os
import re
import subprocess
import sys
import time
from concurrent.futures import ProcessPoolExecutor, as_completed
from pathlib import Path

_HERE = Path(__file__).resolve().parent                                # 10_backtesting/
_REPO = _HERE.parents[2]                                                # repo root
sys.path.insert(0, str(_REPO / "ROUND_5" / "autoresearch"))
fro
